title: More Tools N' Stuff
description: This mod adds in brand new biomes, mobs, blocks, items, food, etc. into Minecraft!
body:
## This mod is **special**... You can travel to the Moon and Mars or explore the new biomes and features this mod has to offer:

### **1. New Ores!** 
> - Nether, 
> - End
> - and Real-Life/Custom variants!

### **2. New biomes!**
> - Forests, 
> - Jungles,
> - Cave biomes
> - And more!

### **3. A bunch of new blocks!**
> - Custom made variants of existing blocks!
> - A bunch of new custom blocks!
> - And even some classics!

### **4. Brand new tools, weapons and armor (+ items and food)!**
> - Ranging from custom to joke items!
> - And even some Vanilla-like ones!

### **5. Brand new dimensions!**
> - The Moon and its various features,
> - And Mars with its own various features too!




**_This mod has been made in MCreator. (Link: https://mcreator.net/)_**

***Notice: Starting from MTNS/More Tools N' Stuff version 2.9.5, you may require NeoForge! (Yes, we dropped support for Forge).***
